titel: Statements from Commissioner Hoekstra regarding the proposal for simplified tax rules.
html:
Speech by the European Commission, Brussels, June 24, 2026.

Ladies and gentlemen, good afternoon.

One thing is abundantly clear to the Commission: we must improve our business environment. Business...
tldr: The European Commission aims to make it easier for businesses to operate by simplifying tax regulations.
lattlast:
The European Commission is an agency within the EU that works to ensure all countries in the union adhere to the same regulations. Commissioner Hoekstra has stated that it is crucial to improve the conditions for businesses to operate and grow.

To achieve this, the Commission intends to examine new proposals aimed at simplifying tax regulations. By making the rules for taxation easier to understand, it will become simpler for businesses to plan their finances and conduct their operations within Europe.

The goal of these new proposals is to create a better environment for business and trade between the different countries. This is an important ongoing effort within the EU to strengthen the economy.
